title: Kenyan Sirloin Steak with Charred Vegetables
description: A flavorful and keto-friendly dish featuring a Kenyan sirloin steak served with charred vegetables.
instructions: Season the steak with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Grill the steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, brush the bell peppers, onions, and zucchini with oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the vegetables for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they're charred and tender.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Serve the steak with the charred vegetables on the side.
